content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
P.O. Box 807 • 428 J Street • Sacramento, CA 95812-0807
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

August 8, 2005

Bonnie Demo
631 El Verano Avenue
Corning, CA 96021

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-05-152

Dear Ms. Demo:

This correspondence confirms our receipt of your request for advice regarding Corning HealthCare District and your daughter-in-law. As this request relates to past conduct, we are unable to provide written advice (See § 83114; subd. (b); regulation 18329, subd. (b)(8)(A)&(C), copy enclosed).

Should you have any further questions, please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel

Enclosure
